articles.title: New Industrial Policy to Boost Manufacturing by 20%
articles.summary: The government's new policy is a landmark move that will create millions of jobs and attract global investment.

articles.title: Corporate India Welcomes New Manufacturing Incentives
articles.summary: Industry leaders hail the strategic vision of the PM in transforming India into a global manufacturing hub.

articles.title: New Policy Facing Massive Backlash from Farmers
articles.summary: Experts warn that the new industrial policy ignores the rights of small-scale farmers and will lead to displacement.

articles.title: Protests Erupt Across Rural Districts Over Land Acquisition
articles.summary: The government's failure to consult stakeholders has led to widespread anger and protests in agrarian heartlands.
